'''Jasper McKnives''' was a [[Kajain'sa'Nikto/Legends|Kajain'sa'Nikto]] from [[Kintan/Legends|Kintan]].

==Biography==
As a member of the death-worshiping [[Cult of M'dweshuu]], McKnives sought ways to appease his religions' demand for blood sacrifice. During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], he made his way to the violent, nigh-unknown [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Rattatak/Legends|Rattatak]]. He committed several murders with the intent of being forced into the gladiatorial games as punishment—a wish which was granted. Though he was one of the better gladiators, he was [[Death/Legends|killed]] when a fallen [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], [[Asajj Ventress/Legends|Asajj Ventress]], used [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] to collapse a portion of the arena's ceiling onto him in an attempt to impress [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]].
